use_cases: Application navigation menus for SaaS platforms mimicking desktop OS patterns
File and edit operations menu for document-based web applications
Settings and preferences dropdown menus with keyboard shortcut support
Admin dashboard navigation with macOS-inspired menu bar design
ai_summary: A macOS-style menu bar component that replicates the native desktop application menu experience with dropdown submenus, keyboard shortcuts, and hover states. Features standard File/Edit menu patterns with separator support and submenu indicators. Designed for web applications seeking a native desktop feel, offering both mouse and keyboard navigation.
